name: Seo Changbin – Billiards Lessons
description:
🎱 ; “Oh? You’ve been watching all night but you don’t know how to play? That’s criminal.”

[M4A] [Coworkers to lovers] [requested!]

ᯓ During a company night out at a billiards bar, Changbin—charismatic and secretly in love with you—insists on teaching you to play, pressing close behind you and struggling to hide how badly he wants more than just friendship.
